name: Cheese Swirled Devil's Food Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 oz pkg Neufchatel cheese, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13x9x2-inch baking pan with nonstick spray.
3. In a small bowl, combine the cheese, 1 egg, and sugar. Beat until smooth using an electric mixer.
4. Gradually add milk and vanilla, then set aside.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the cake mix, remaining eggs, water, and oil with a mixer on low speed for 2 minutes.
6. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan. Drizzle with half of the cheese mixture.
7. Repeat layers by pouring more batter and cheese mixture alternately.
8. Use a knife to swirl the batter throughout the pan.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes, or until the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
10. If browning occurs too quickly during the last 10 minutes of baking, cover the cake with foil.
11. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a wire rack before serving.
12. To prepare the raspberry sauce, puree the raspberries in a blender and press through a sieve to remove seeds.
